articles.original_title: Lakers News: Marcus Smart ‘Grateful’ To Be Back Contributing In Playoffs
articles.summary: Marcus Smart is only four years removed from winning the Defensive Player of the Year award. However, injuries and trades derailed him, limiting him to 54 games and zero playoff appearances for two teams in the last two seasons. articles.title: Celtics' Derrick White wins NBA's Sportsmanship Award, as selected by the league's players
articles.original_title: Celtics' Derrick White wins NBA's Sportsmanship Award, as selected by the league's players
articles.summary: Derrick White of the Boston Celtics is the NBA's Sportsmanship Award winner for this season, as selected by his fellow players across the league.  TJ McConnell of the Indiana Pacers — who actually got more first-place votes, almost 22% — was second, while Harrison Barnes of the San Antonio Spurs was third and Al Horford of the Golden State Warriors was fourth.

articles.title: AJ Dybantsa officially declares for the NBA draft and is a top candidate to be the No. 1 pick
articles.original_title: AJ Dybantsa officially declares for the NBA draft and is a top candidate to be the No. 1 pick
articles.summary: AJ Dybantsa has made it official: He's entering the NBA draft.  The BYU forward — widely expected to be a top candidate to be the No. 1 pick — made the announcement Thursday.  Dybantsa led the nation by averaging 25.5 points per game in his lone college season, along with 6.8 rebounds and 3.7 assists per game.

articles.title: Potential No. 1 pick AJ Dybantsa officially declares for NBA draft
articles.original_title: Potential No. 1 pick AJ Dybantsa officially declares for NBA draft
articles.summary: This was expected. After a strong freshman season at BYU, Dybantsa is on top of many team's draft boards.

articles.title: Victor Wembanyama will travel with the Spurs to Portland but his Game 3 status remains uncertain
articles.original_title: Victor Wembanyama will travel with the Spurs to Portland but his Game 3 status remains uncertain
articles.summary: Victor Wembanyama will travel with the San Antonio Spurs to Portland for games this weekend while continuing to complete the steps mandated by the league's concussion protocol.  Spurs coach Mitch Johnson stopped short Thursday of saying Wembanyama will play in Game 3.  Wembanyama is “progressing,” Johnson said, but his status against the Trail Blazers remains uncertain.

articles.title: Victor Wembanyama will travel with the Spurs to Portland, but his status for Game 3 is not yet determined, coach says

articles.summary: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Victor Wembanyama will travel with the Spurs to Portland, but his status for Game 3 is not yet determined, coach says.
